g.text: FABIO taxes less subsidies per item for United Arab Emirates (ARE) — a FABIO-internal decomposition; the
World Bank reference is TOTAL-only, so no WB line is drawn. No external strand benchmark covers this country.
Items grouped as "Other" exactly as in the TOTAL figure (below 3% max |share| of WB across years). Rows:
FABIO taxes less subsidies [GLORIA] — United Arab Emirates (ARE) (value-added sub-account)
Taxes less subsidies on production (current US$)
Taxes less subsidies on production (current US$)
